headline: The Bull Case For Franklin Resources (BEN) Could Change Following New Morningstar Public/Private Portfolio Partnership
summary: Morningstar Wealth recently announced it is partnering with Apollo Global Management, Franklin Resources, and J.P. Morgan Asset Management to launch the Morningstar Public/Private Select Series, a suite of public/private model portfolios for financial advisors that blend ETFs and interval funds across public equities, private credit, and real estate. By pairing Franklin Resources’ public and private market strategies with Morningstar’s asset allocation and due diligence framework, the...
